commands.name: pr-complete

parameters.meaning: Expected PR head SHA; use a full SHA or current alias where supported.
parameters.name: --expected-head-sha

commands.purpose: Wait for PR CI, merge safely, sync main, acknowledge rules, and run post-merge completion.

commands.purpose: Wait until PR checks are ready.

commands.purpose: Merge a green PR through the guarded merge path.

commands.name: post-merge-complete

parameters.meaning: The PR number whose merge triggered the lifecycle.
parameters.name: --after-pr

commands.purpose: Complete the post-merge lifecycle after a PR merge.
